subject: [PATCH v2 4/9] mm: percpu: Split memcg charging and kmem accounting

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch splits memory group (memcg) charging and kernel memory (kmem) accounting into two separate steps to handle per-memcg-per-node kmem accounting. The first step, obj_cgroup_precharge(), reserves pages for memcg limit enforcement without updating kmem stats. The second step, obj_cgroup_account_kmem(), accounts kmem after the allocation succeeds and places any remaining sub-page remainder in the object stock. This decoupling allows temporary overcharging of memcg but ensures that things return to normal through obj_stock draining.
